expectations.text: Response includes an intake exchange (1-3 questions) before the curriculum.
expectations.evidence: Q1 (goal — debug vs modify vs conceptual fluency) and Q2 (starting point — multi-select) before the curriculum proposal.

expectations.text: A curriculum markdown file is saved to outputs/curriculum.md.

expectations.text: Curriculum references at least 3 real file paths under infra/.
Curriculum covers general k8s/EKS concepts (not just our manifests).
expectations.evidence: Explicit concepts: 'K8s networking layers (Service, Ingress, LB)', 'managed control plane vs self-managed, IRSA vs Pod Identity', 'NodePool/EC2NodeClass, bin-packing, consolidation', 'HPA metric loop, KEDA scalers, scale-to-zero', 'GitOps, pull vs push deploy, observability triangle'.

expectations.text: Lesson 1 starts from a real file or set of files in infra/ and ladders to a general concept.
expectations.evidence: Baseline stopped at the plan with 'Tell me your Q1/Q2 answers and I'll write the file and start.' Lesson 1 was never executed.

expectations.text: Lesson 1 ends with an active comprehension check.
